summary: The Ress protocol provider divergence is rustfmt-only noise: semicolon insertion on loop breaks and boolean condition line wrapping.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 268: M	crates/ress/protocol/src/provider.rs.
The isolated patch only rewraps response-limit conditions and adds semicolons to existing `break` statements.
No header/body serving limits, byte-limit checks, provider lookup, or response construction behavior changed.
